queries.question: Show all the graphic design tools, also show the web design tools that run on a subscription model.
queries.sql:
SELECT Digital_Tools.Name 
FROM Digital_Tools
WHERE Digital_Tools.Category = "Graphic Design" OR Digital_Tools.Category = "Web Design" AND Digital_Tools.Access = "Subscription"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?digital_tools a :Digital_Tools .
  ?digital_tools p:name ?name .
  ?digital_tools p:Category ?category_w .
  ?digital_tools p:Category ?category_w2 .
  ?digital_tools p:Access ?access_w .
  FILTER((STR(?category_w) = "Graphic Design" || (STR(?category_w2) = "Web Design" && STR(?access_w) = "Subscription")))
}

queries.question: Show all graphic design tools and web design tools which need a subscription.
queries.sql:
SELECT Digital_Tools.Name 
FROM Digital_Tools
WHERE (Digital_Tools.Category = "Graphic Design" OR Digital_Tools.Category = "Web Design") AND Digital_Tools.Access = "Subscription"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?digital_tools a :Digital_Tools .
  ?digital_tools p:name ?name .
  ?digital_tools p:Category ?category_w .
  ?digital_tools p:Category ?category_w2 .
  ?digital_tools p:Access ?access_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?category_w) = "Graphic Design" || STR(?category_w2) = "Web Design")) && STR(?access_w) = "Subscription"))
}
